title: Reobrix Military Tiger I Tank Building Toy Set for Adults, 1:28 Scale WW2 Heavy Army Battle Tanks Model, 77031 World of Tanks Licensed War Tracked Vehicles Hobby Gift for Boys Man (1138PCS)
features: 【Reobrix TIGER I Tank Building Set 77031】 This tank building block product captures the essence of the TIGER I tank at a 1:28 scale, carefully replicating every detail to bring an immersive military building experience. World of Tanks licensed products. Included in the package are comprehensive, precise paper assembly instructions that are easy to follow.

【High playability structure】 The turret can be rotated 360°. The top turret is layered and can be quickly disassembled. The turret hatch and turret door can be opened. The gun barrel can be raised and lowered. The two tracks can smoothly drive the tank to move and restore the vehicle. Inside the driver's seat, shell rack, engine, exquisite pad-printed stickers. It is extremely playable and is one of the best choices for building military scenes

【Premium Building Experience】This tank building block is made of high-quality and environmentally friendly ABS material, ensuring precise color matching and sturdy structure. Each part is exquisitely polished, feels smooth, fits well, and is compatible with mainstream building blocks on the market. During the assembly process, you can not only experience the fun of hands-on work, but also gain an in-depth understanding of the internal structure of the tank

【Collection and Decorative Value】 This tiger i world of tanks product is officially authorized by World of Tanks, showing the appearance of the real model to the maximum extent. The Reobrix brand is exquisitely packaged. It is an excellent collection for those who love military and engineering project building block models

【Ideal Gift for Boys and Girls】This world of tanks tiger i block model kit is a perfect gift for teenagers and adults, you can give it to your family and friends on birthdays, Christmas, Thanksgiving, Children's Day, Halloween, Easter, etc. them. In addition, if you find that some parts are missing from the kit after receiving the product, please tell us and we will send the missing parts to you as soon as possible
